    Summary
    E-class hunter Jinwoo Sung is the weakest of them all. Looked down on by everyone, he has no money, no abilities to speak of, and no other job prospects. So when his party finds a hidden dungeon, he’s determined to use this chance to change his life for the better…but the opportunity he finds is […]

    E-class hunter Jinwoo Sung is the weakest of them all. Looked down on by everyone, he has no money, no abilities to speak of, and no other job prospects. So when his party finds a hidden dungeon, he's determined to use this chance to change his life for the better...but the opportunity he finds is a bit different from what he had in mind...Original Webtoon:KakaoPage, DaumOfficial English Translation:Yen Press (Volumes), Tappytoon, Pocket Comics, Tapas, Webnovel,Official Translations:Japanese, Thai, Indonesian, S.Chinese, T.Chinese, German

    Action Adventure Drama Fantasy Shounen Super Power

    Kiryuu adalah platform baca manga, manhwa, dan manhua bahasa Indonesia terlengkap dengan ribuan judul dari berbagai genre. Update chapter terbaru setiap hari, tampilan responsif di semua perangkat, dan fitur bookmark untuk menyimpan bacaan favoritmu. Akses gratis melalui portal resmi kiryuu.io — dari fans, untuk fans.
